description_long: This is a male adult figure with a neatly groomed beard and short hair, dressed in a buttoned-up collared shirt with sleeves rolled up to the elbows. He wears fitted trousers secured with a belt and sturdy, rounded-toe shoes. The shirt is tucked in, giving a tidy and casual yet slightly formal appearance suitable for urban environments. His hands are relaxed at his sides, and his posture is upright and natural. The figure's facial features are well-defined, and the overall build is average and proportional. There are no visible accessories or carried items, and the clothing fits closely to the body.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a collared shirt, fitted trousers, and sturdy shoes, standing upright with a neat appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, buttoned shirt, belt, and both hands at sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the shirt and trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, belt, and trousers, with arms slightly away from the body.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the shirt and trousers.
attribute_clothing_type: casual button-up shirt with rolled sleeves and fitted trousers with a belt
